title: 🪂 New CRM feature incoming 🪂 Zoom timeline integration

posts.author: monday_CRM (monday CRM)
posts.cookedHtml:
Zoom timeline integration
Get the full picture of every contact and account with Zoom meetings that appear right in your emails & activities timeline.

Here’s how it works: connect your Zoom account via the emails & activities settings and meetings that you host or attend with the contact will automatically appear.

You’ll be able to see:

  • The meeting name
  • The names of participants
  • The time and length of the meeting
  • A link to the meeting recording
  • The meeting transcript

With all contact history in one clear timeline, you’ll always know where a deal stands and what you need to move it forward.

This feature is fully released to all users in the Pro plan and above. Learn more about it here.

Available only on monday CRM

posts.author: fazed (Faze)
posts.cookedHtml: finally, So glad this feature is coming in. as most of our office meetings are done on zoom. I would be delighted as it will be very benefitial
